title: Roja
desc: Roja, a simple girl from a village in Tamil Nadu, makes desperate efforts to find her husband, Rishi, after he is kidnapped by militants during a secret undercover mission in Jammu and Kashmir.

title: Josh
desc: Satya a strong valued youth fights corrupt politicians who come to his college to fulfill their selfish reasons.

title: Ngk
desc: Nandha Gopalan Kumaran is forced to join politics to help his village. He faces various obstacles while learning the tricks to survive in power.

title: Namo Venkatesa
desc: Ramana, a ventriloquist, falls in love with Pooja, the daughter of a rich factionist, while on tour in Europe. When she is forced to marry against her wish, Ramana and her uncle decide to rescue her.

title: Ninu Veedani Needanu Nene
desc: A young couple find themselves in a terrifying situation after their car meets with an accident near a cemetery. After they return home, everything seems normal except when they look in the mirror.

title: Mass
desc: Priya lives in a city that is paralyzed with fear by the local crippled gangster, Satya and his dreaded son, Shatru.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A lighthearted comedy packed with laughter, mischief, and fun moments that celebrate friendship, joy, and carefree living.

title: Aishwaraabimasthu
desc: Two inseparable friends run a mobile shop; their bond angers partners who try to separate them, sparking funny, romantic and friendship driven adventures together.

title: Lakshya
desc: Pardhu, a gifted archer, loses his way after setbacks but decides to redeem himself and train for a championship.

title: Slot - Accu Dhurandar
desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, rises with precision, and secretly tears apart the ISI Underworld nexus from within, balancing danger with true justice.

title: Attili Satti Babu
desc: A ruthless moneylender, Athili Sathibabu, exploits others until love for a beautician teaches him to value relationships. The remainder shows him changing his ways.

title: Rowdy Alludu
desc: Kalyan's enemies replace him with an impostor, Johnny, and then frame him for murder. When Johnny realises Kalyan's innocence, he decides to help him.

desc: Honey reunites ex-lovers, but gets kidnapped before their union.

title: Khaidi
desc: Dilli, an ex convict, tries to reunite with his daughter but faces obstacles during a drug raid.

desc: Gullible Madhu navigates love, friendship, and memory loss before finding happiness.

desc: Nikhil, a youngster, plays videogames and woos girls on social media. However, his life turns upside down when he tries to hit on Rags, a game developer.

title: Money
desc: 2 boys kidnap their neighbor's wife for ransom. Later they learn that her husband wants to kill her for property so they rescue her from his clutches.
